summary: Frontend-only verification for Digitalindo landing page changes in Services (id=services), Benefits (id=benefits) and Footer. All 6 review criteria PASS. Verified via Playwright on desktop (1920x1080) against the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is 1087 lines - consider splitting into Hero / Services / Calculator / AIGenerator / Benefits / Footer subcomponents for maintainability.

Repeated card wrapper classes ('border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center space-y-4 hover:border-orange-500 transition-colors duration-300') are duplicated across 3 benefit cards; could be extracted into a small <BenefitCard /> component.
Benefit-card div is not wrapped in any data-testid; suggest adding data-testid="benefit-card-{idx}" to mirror service-card-{idx} for future tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 validated: (1) Services card-0 Meta Ads tile bg=rgb(219,234,254) bg-blue-100 with meta logo naturalWidth=1200 (loaded). (2) Services card-1 Google Ads tile bg=rgb(209,250,229) bg-emerald-100 with google ads logo naturalWidth=1200 (loaded). (3) Services card-4 title='SEO dan GEO' with lucide-search SVG (class 'lucide lucide-search'). (4) All 3 benefit cards have classes 'flex flex-col items-center text-center', h3 computed text-align=center. (5) Benefit card 0 title='Pemasaran Tepat Sasaran' (no 'Lokal'), desc mentions 'minat, perilaku, dan kebutuhan' (no 'lokasi'/'geografi'), icon=lucide-target. (6) Benefit 1 icon=lucide-dollar-sign for 'Biaya yang Dapat Disesuaikan'. (7) Benefit 2 icon=WhatsApp custom SVG (path starts 'M.057 24...') for 'Dipantau Lewat Handphone'. (8) Footer contains 'Pontianak, Indonesia' and does NOT contain 'Jakarta'. AI generator not tested (out of scope per request).
rca of the issue: No issues found — all changes implemented correctly per the review request.
